TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Panital ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 127 buwan, 427 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 406 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Panital hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Panital hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Panital hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Panital hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Panital hya' ga Nakahila. tay mkyahu' na Panital hya' ga Lamuan. tay 'llaw na Panital hya' ga Sinkam. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Panital ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Panital ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ panital ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na panital ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħila. taj mkjaħuʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lamuan. taj ʔllaw na panital ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinkam. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ panital ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ panital ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Panital ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 127 buwan, 427 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 406 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Panital hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Panital hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Panital hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Panital hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Panital hya' ga Nakahila. tay mkyahu' na Panital hya' ga Lamuan. tay 'llaw na Panital hya' ga Sinkam. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Panital ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Panital ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ panital ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na panital ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħila. taj mkjaħuʔ na panital ħjaʔ ɣa lamuan. taj ʔllaw na panital ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinkam. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ panital ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ panital ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
